summary: End-to-end testing of VisitSarva MVP. Backend pytest suite: 30/30 passed covering auth (register/login/refresh/me, admin-self-register rejection, bad password 401), public properties (list+filters+featured+detail+404), seller CRUD (create returns pending_verification w/ listed_by, list, update resets to pending, buyer cannot create -> 403), admin (buyer/seller blocked 403, stats keys, pending queue, verify->published verified via public detail, reject flow), enquiries (anonymous + counter increment + 404 on unknown), services (auth-only /my + create), saved properties save/unsave/list, and AI endpoints (smart-search returns summary/filters/results/count; listing-assistant returns reply+extracted JSON with at least category). Frontend Playwright: Landing all 7 sections visible; login flows for admin/seller/buyer redirect to correct dashboards; properties list filters work (URL updates, results change, clear works); property detail loads and enquiry form submits successfully; AI smart search from landing navigates to /properties?smart=1 and shows banner + results; services request submits with toast; seller new listing AI assistant chat populates category (title empty for this prompt but flow proceeds); listing created -> visible as pending; admin pending tab + approve removes from queue.

ui_bugs.issue: First stats card renders blank (icon/label missing) while other 3 cards (Published/Users/Enquiries) render correctly. The number is also not visible. Likely a missing icon import or conditional render bug for the 'pending' stat.
ui_bugs.selector: data-testid not present on stat card

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by emergent's dynamic instrumentation injecting <span> inside option labels from .map(). Non-blocking but appears in console for every option-rendering page.

For prompt 'I want to list a 3 BHK apartment in Whitefield Bangalore, 1850 sqft, asking 1.45 crore', only category was autofilled in UI; title field remained empty (backend extracted JSON did include title in pytest run). UI may not be merging all extracted fields into the form on first AI turn — verify the merge logic in NewListing.jsx.

issues: First stats card empty — visual asymmetry against the other 3 populated cards.

action_items: Fix AdminDashboard 'pending listings' stats card rendering (missing icon/label/value).
Investigate NewListing.jsx form merge — ensure title (and other) fields are populated from extracted JSON when provided by AI on first turn.
Optional: suppress or restructure <option> children to avoid hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_router.refresh-token uses body: dict instead of a Pydantic model — accept any JSON; consider RefreshTokenRequest model for validation.
properties_router has no rate limiting on /api/enquiries — could be abused; consider basic IP throttling.
ai_router catches all Exception then returns 502 — fine, but consider logging the underlying error for observability.

seller_router.update_listing silently flips status to pending_verification even on minor edits (e.g., description). This matches the requirement but should be documented in UI to set seller expectations.
models.py PropertyImage stores base64 data URLs — fine for MVP but storing large strings in Mongo will inflate documents; flag for migration to object storage later.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@visitsarva.in / VisitSarva@2025; Seller: demo.seller@visitsarva.in / Demo@2025; Buyer: demo.buyer@visitsarva.in / Demo@2025 (all from /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Tests created multiple TEST_-prefixed listings (verified/rejected/pending) via seller account and a few TEST_ enquiries/services. They remain in DB intentionally so the next agent has fixtures. AI assistant flow also created one fresh pending listing that was auto-approved during the admin test (now published).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all critical APIs and currently passes 30/30. Frontend critical flows all work; only known UI issues are: (1) admin dashboard first stats card blank, (2) AI listing assistant title autofill miss in UI, (3) console hydration warning for <option><span>. After fixes, re-run pytest and re-check admin dashboard render + seller new-listing AI autofill in NewListing.jsx.
rca_of_the_issue: AdminDashboard pending stats card likely uses a different prop/icon than the other three cards (a copy-paste miss); inspect StatCard rendering for the 'pending_listings' entry. NewListing AI autofill miss: handler probably guards against empty string but the AI may have placed title in a slightly different key — verify _extract_json output vs form merge keys in NewListing.jsx.
